name: chimera-monorepo
description: AWS Chimera - Multi-tenant agent platform monorepo

scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:packages && bun run build:infra
scripts.build:packages: bun run build:core && bun run build:sse-bridge && bun run build:chat-gateway && bun run build:cli
scripts.test:all: bun run test:shared && bun run test:core && bun run test:sse-bridge && bun run test:chat-gateway && bun run test:cli && bun run test:infra && bun run test:integration
scripts.lint: bun run lint:packages && bun run lint:infra
scripts.lint:packages: cd packages/shared && bun run lint && cd ../core && bun run lint && cd ../sse-bridge && bun run lint && cd ../chat-gateway && bun run lint && cd ../cli && bun run lint
scripts.clean: bun run clean:packages && bun run clean:infra
scripts.seed:reset: cd seed-data && bun run seed.ts --delete-tables && bun run seed.ts
